title: centaurea shepardii
intro: Centaurea shepardii, also known as Shepherd's Needle, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. Centaurea shepardii is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Centaurea shepardii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
